import sys
from sys import stdin

def solve():
    input_data = stdin.read().split()
    idx = 0
    n = int(input_data[idx]); idx+=1
    a = [0] + [int(input_data[idx+i]) for i in range(n)]; idx+=n
    b = [0] + [int(input_data[idx+i]) for i in range(n)]; idx+=n
    
    # BFS
    parent = [-1] * (n+1)  # parent[x] = node we came from (after slip)
    visited = [False] * (n+1)
    
    # nxt[i] = next unvisited node >= i (1..n)
    nxt = list(range(n+2))  # nxt[i] = i initially
    
    def find(i):
        while nxt[i] != i:
            nxt[i] = nxt[nxt[i]]
            i = nxt[i]
        return i
    
    def mark_visited(i):
        nxt[i] = i+1  # point to next
    
    visited[n] = True
    mark_visited(n)
    frontier = [n]
    jumps = 0
    escape_from = -1
    escape_jump_pos = -1
    
    # ... BFS
